concerns.text: The plan cites 'P2SAMAPA/p2-etf-functional-anova-results' (HuggingFace) as the 'Verified Dataset'. However, the text immediately acknowledges this dataset contains 'functional ANOVA results' (aggregated statistics), not the raw participant-level ratings required for the primary analysis (FR-004, US-2). The plan relies on 'new data collection' to generate the primary dataset, rendering the cited URL irrelevant for the core hypothesis test. A dataset citation must provide the actual data needed for the analysis, not just a reference to a results file from a different study. The plan must either cite a repository containing raw visual-aesthetics survey data (if one exists) or explicitly remove the 'Verified Datasets' block for this study, acknowledging that data is primary-collected.
